title: Stacksmith Tool Configuration
description: Defines backend, provider mappings, module mappings, OpenTofu version, and validation rules for stacksmith.

inline.description: Inline Python expression or code block. `value` is available in scope and a truthy result passes validation.

script.description: Relative or absolute path to a local Python validation script. Relative paths resolve from the config file directory.

inline.description: Inline Python code defining `transform(value, **context)` and returning the transformed value.

jinja.description: Jinja template rendered with `value` in scope. Rendered output is JSON-decoded when valid JSON, otherwise treated as a string.

script.description: Relative or absolute path to a local Python transform script defining `transform(value, **context)`. Relative paths resolve from the config file directory.

mapped_to.description: Optional mapped module input name for the property. If omitted, the original property name is used.

default.description: Default value used when no explicit value is supplied for this module property.

auto_inject.description: Optional per-property override for module auto-injection. Set to false to skip injecting this input even when module auto_inject is enabled.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the post-plan validation.

enabled.description: Whether this plan validation rule should be executed. Defaults to true.

rule.description: Python validation rule to apply to parsed OpenTofu JSON plan output.

alias.description: Provider alias used for non-default instances.

inline.description: Inline Python code defining `config(**context)` and returning a provider configuration mapping.

script.description: Relative or absolute path to a local Python provider config script defining `config(**context)`.

data.description: Provider-specific YAML mapping such as region, assume_role, endpoints, and retry settings.

instances.description: Named provider instances. A default instance is optional; non-default instances must be explicitly aliased.

type.description: Auth type: 'token' for Bearer token, 'basic' for username/password, 'ssh' for SSH key.

token_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the Bearer token.

username_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the username for basic auth.

password_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the password for basic auth.

ssh_key_path.description: Path to the SSH private key file.

remote_auth.description: Optional per-host auth configuration for fetching remote resources. Keys are hostnames.

var_validations.description: Optional per-variable Python validation rules applied after all resolution layers. Keyed by variable name. `value` holds the resolved variable value.

plan_validations.description: Optional post-plan validation rules keyed by name. Rules run against parsed OpenTofu JSON plan output unless disabled.

backend.description: Backend configuration with explicit backend type and freeform backend-specific settings.

type.description: OpenTofu backend type (for example: s3, local, azurerm, gcs, oss).

provider_mappings.description: Provider families keyed by OpenTofu provider name.

description.description: Optional friendly display name for the module. Used by stacksmith inspect output when present.

source.description: Module source address. Must be a Git repository URL (git::, git@, ssh://, http(s)://*.git*) or a OpenTofu registry source. Local paths are not allowed.

version.description: Module version. For Git-style sources, appended as ?ref=v<version>. For registry sources, used as the module's literal version attribute. Required for all sources.

auto_inject.description: When true, resolved input values are auto-injected into this module mapping by exact input key match and declared mapping keys. Defaults to false.

tags.description: Optional module-level tags used for tag-expression targeting.

providers.description: Optional module provider mapping. Keys are module provider names, values are provider instance references in `<provider>.<instance>` format.

properties.description: Optional per-property configuration for module inputs. Keys are original property names from stack resources.

module_mappings.description: Module mappings keyed by abstract resource type.
